Club at a Glance

Train, race and belong.

A student triathlon community built around performance, inclusivity and friendship.

150+ Members
6 Weekly Sessions
40+ Races
BUCS Competitive Team

Training

Swim. Bike. Run. Repeat.

Sessions for complete beginners, social athletes and experienced racers.

Swim

Swimming

Coached pool sessions for a range of abilities.

Cycling

Social and structured rides around Sheffield and the Peak District.

Join

Ready to join Sheffield Triathlon?

You do not need to be a triathlete to start. Come along, meet the club and give it a go.

S Sheffield Triathlon Swim. Bike. Run. Belong.

Training, racing and socials for complete beginners and experienced triathletes at the University of Sheffield.

A student-led club connected to University of Sheffield sport.
